languages.text: "Приказываю перейти в оборону и обеспечить планете снабжение извне. А ксенотвари рано или поздно успокоятся".
"Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."
languages.original_text: "Приказываю перейти в оборону и обеспечить планете снабжение извне. А ксенотвари рано или поздно успокоятся".

traits.locale_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."
"Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."
"Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

languages.text: 「私の命令は、防衛策を講じ、外からこの惑星に物資を供給すること。そして、異星生物については、いずれ落ち着くだろう」
languages.original_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: 「私の命令は、防衛策を講じ、外からこの惑星に物資を供給すること。そして、異星生物については、いずれ落ち着くだろう。」

languages.text: «Estas son mis órdenes: tomen medidas defensivas y envíen suministros al planeta desde la órbita. En cuanto a las xenobestias, se tranquilizarán tarde o temprano».
languages.original_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: «Estas son mis órdenes: tomen medidas defensivas y envíen suministros al planeta desde la órbita. En cuanto a las xenobestias, se tranquilizarán tarde o temprano».

languages.text: “我的命令如下：采取防御态势，从外部为行星调运补给。至于异形怪物，它们总会逐渐安定下来。”
languages.original_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: “我的命令如下：采取防御态势，从外部为行星调运补给。至于异形怪物，它们总会逐渐安定下来。”

languages.text: "Hier sind meine Befehle: Ergreift Abwehrmaßnahmen und unterstützt den Planeten von außen. Die Xenobestien werden sich früher oder später beruhigen."
languages.original_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: "Hier sind meine Befehle: Ergreift Abwehrmaßnahmen und unterstützt den Planeten von außen. Die Xenobestien werden sich früher oder später beruhigen."

languages.text: "Emirlerim şunlardır: Savunma önlemleri alın ve gezegene dışarıdan ikmal yapın. Zenohayvanlara gelince... Er ya da geç sakinleşeceklerdir."
languages.original_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: "Emirlerim şunlardır: Savunma önlemleri alın ve gezegene dışarıdan ikmal yapın. Zenohayvanlara gelince... Er ya da geç sakinleşeceklerdir."

languages.text: « Voici mes ordres : prenez des mesures défensives et approvisionnez la planète depuis l'extérieur. Quant aux xénobêtes, elles finiront bien par se calmer. »
languages.original_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: « Voici mes ordres : prenez des mesures défensives et approvisionnez la planète depuis l'extérieur. Quant aux xénobêtes, elles finiront bien par se calmer. »
